analysis.summary_en: Semiconductor heavyweights ripped higher — TSMC +5.05%, MediaTek limit-up +9.93%, ASE +6.78% — yet TAIEX closed -0.68%, meaning broad market was hit hard beneath the surface. The tape looks like a defensive rotation INTO AI/foundry names and OUT of everything else, likely driven by Strait of Hormuz photoresist shock + OSAT price hike narrative. Hon Hai bucked sympathy and fell -1.56% despite the Mitsubishi EV MOU, suggesting foreign selling pressure on the index's second-largest name.
analysis.summary_zh: 半導體權值股強勢噴出——台積電+5.05%、聯發科漲停+9.93%、日月光+6.78%——但加權指數收跌-0.68%,代表檯面下廣泛殺盤嚴重。盤面像是防禦性資金輪動進AI/晶圓代工,撤出其他類股,催化劑可能是荷莫茲海峽光阻劑斷鏈疑慮加上OSAT漲價題材。鴻海逆勢跌-1.56%,即使有三菱電機EV合資MOU利多,暗示外資對這檔第二大權值股有賣壓。

key_stories.headline_en: MediaTek limit-up +9.93% alongside TSMC surge — Google TPU split narrative + N2P ecosystem
key_stories.headline_zh: 聯發科漲停+9.93%隨台積電大漲——Google TPU訓練/推論分流+N2P生態題材
key_stories.analysis_en: MediaTek hitting 10% daily limit on volume is extreme. Google's TPU v8t/v8i split story reinforces ASIC tailwind (MediaTek is rumored Google TPU co-design partner), and M31's eUSB2V2 N2P tapeout confirms 2nm ecosystem is live. TSMC's 5% move matches the ADR (-0.08% divergence = no overnight surprise, this is fundamental repricing). The question is whether MediaTek's limit-up is sustainable or a squeeze — limit-up days often see follow-through next session but fade within a week if no earnings catalyst.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 聯發科帶量漲停幅度極端。Google TPU v8t/v8i訓練推論分流劇本強化ASIC順風(市場傳聞聯發科為Google TPU共同設計夥伴),M31在N2P完成eUSB2V2 tapeout確認2nm生態已啟動。台積電與ADR幾乎零背離(-0.08%),代表不是隔夜突發而是基本面重評價。聯發科漲停能否延續是關鍵——漲停次日常有慣性,但若無財報催化一週內易回吐。

key_stories.headline_en: Hon Hai -1.56% despite Mitsubishi Electric EV MOU — disconnect worth noting
key_stories.headline_zh: 鴻海逆勢跌-1.56%即使有三菱電機EV合資MOU——值得注意的脫鉤
key_stories.analysis_en: Taking a 50% stake in Mitsubishi Electric Mobility is a meaningful EV-hardware expansion. Yet Hon Hai fell on heavy volume (75M shares) while AI peers surged. Mechanism: foreign funds likely rotated OUT of lower-margin assembler into higher-margin AI silicon (TSMC/MediaTek/ASE). This is sector rotation, not a Foxconn-specific negative. If broader market stabilizes next session, Hon Hai should catch sympathy bid on the MOU.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 取得三菱電機Mobility 50%股權是EV硬體布局重大進展。但鴻海在7500萬股大量下逆勢下跌,AI同業卻噴出。機制:外資從低毛利組裝廠輪出,進入高毛利AI矽晶片(台積電/聯發科/日月光)。這是類股輪動,非鴻海個股利空。若大盤次日企穩,鴻海應受MOU利多帶動補漲。

key_stories.headline_en: ASE +6.78% on OSAT pricing power story
key_stories.headline_zh: 日月光+6.78%受OSAT漲價題材帶動
key_stories.analysis_en: DigiTimes explicitly flagged OSAT costs rising faster than foundry — ASE is the direct beneficiary as global #1 packager. ADR divergence only +0.25%, so local move is aligned with fundamental pricing power thesis, not speculation. Advanced packaging (CoWoS adjacency) for AI also supports multi-quarter tailwind.
key_stories.analysis_zh: DigiTimes明確指出OSAT成本漲勢快過晶圓代工——日月光身為全球封測龍頭直接受惠。ADR僅背離+0.25%,本地走勢與基本面定價能力論點一致,非投機。AI相關先進封裝(CoWoS鄰接題材)也支持多季順風。

key_stories.headline_en: Strait of Hormuz photoresist disruption — latent risk not yet priced in most names
key_stories.headline_zh: 荷莫茲海峽光阻劑斷鏈——多數個股尚未反映潛在風險
key_stories.analysis_en: Photoresist shortage from Middle East shipping disruption is a genuine supply-chain risk for ALL fabs, yet TSMC/UMC rallied today. Market appears to be pricing AI demand > materials bottleneck, but if shortage extends, margin compression hits in Q3. Watch JSR/Tokyo Ohka commentary. This is the falsifier for today's foundry rally.
key_stories.analysis_zh: 中東航運中斷造成光阻劑短缺,對所有晶圓廠都是實質供應鏈風險,但今日台積電/聯電反而大漲。市場似乎以AI需求壓過材料瓶頸定價,但若短缺延長,Q3毛利將受壓縮。關注JSR/東京應化評論。這是今日晶圓代工大漲能否成立的關鍵反證。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Himax ADR exploded +10.66% overnight while local 3504 (Yageo, different company — note: HIMX local is 6505.TWO not 3504) fell -1.49%. If the pairing is incorrect this is noise; if Himax-related local proxies exist, expect catch-up bid next session on display-driver/AI-glasses narrative. Investigate before acting.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 奇景光電ADR隔夜暴漲+10.66%,但本地3504(國巨,不同公司——注意:奇景本地代號為6505.TWO非3504)卻跌-1.49%。若配對錯誤則為雜訊;若有奇景相關本地代理股,次日可能在顯示驅動IC/AI眼鏡題材下補漲。交易前需先查證。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Effectively zero divergence — today's 5% move is synchronized global repricing, not overnight ADR leak. No arbitrage.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 實質零背離——今日5%漲幅為全球同步重評價,非ADR隔夜領先。無套利空間。

adr_arbitrage.interpretation_en: Tight alignment, move is fundamental (OSAT pricing), no arb.
adr_arbitrage.interpretation_zh: 貼合度高,走勢反映基本面(OSAT漲價),無套利。

analysis.no_signals_note: Falsifiers: (1) If MediaTek gaps down next session on profit-taking, the Google TPU thesis weakens. (2) If Hon Hai continues selling on rising volume, it's not rotation but company-specific concern (e.g., iPhone build cut rumors). (3) If photoresist headlines escalate with named fab impact, today's foundry rally reverses sharply.
